page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture with a 35 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most multi-core and memory operations. The stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU scores are average, though single-core performance and single-threaded gzip compression are weak. Memory bandwidth is solid, with read-only small block cached speeds reaching 389.93 GB/sec and large block uncached write speeds at 37.84 GB/sec. Database operations and Redis SET performance are average, with Redis achieving 6.84 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r6.2xlarge offers a balanced profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require high-performance local storage or GPU acceleration. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent execution, though the lower single-core performance represents a tradeoff for compute-heavy tasks. This instance is well-suited for memory-optimized workloads such as database operations, caching layers, and web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, but lacks local storage and GPU hardware. Network connectivity is established at a baseline of 2 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, though single-core execution is relatively weak. The instance excels in memory-bound tasks, showing average performance in database operations and Redis SET benchmarks, where it achieves 6.84 million operations per second. This profile makes the ecs.r6.2xlarge a cost-efficient choice for hosting in-memory databases, caching layers, and general-purpose web serving applications that require substantial memory capacity without the need for high-speed local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 2 Gbps network baseline, delivering average performance for database and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server with dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high memory density for database and caching workloads.
